query:
SELECT 
  bi.description,
  COUNT(*) AS line_count,
  SUM(bi.lineAmount) AS total_amount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT bi.customerExternalId) AS customer_count
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE LOWER(bi.billingPlatform) LIKE '%sasboss%'
  AND bi.lineAmount > 0
GROUP BY bi.description
ORDER BY line_count DESC
LIMIT 40;
